com.hp.workpath.api.device.events

Class DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.BroadcastReceiver
      • com.hp.workpath.api.device.events.DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver
  • Enclosing class:
    DeviceEventsService

    public abstract static class DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver
extends android.content.BroadcastReceiver

    AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the DeviceEventsService operations. The AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver receives callbacks when there have been changes to the state of the event from a printer.

    Since:
    API 5

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver(android.os.Handler handler)
      Default AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver Constructor

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      abstract void onChange(DeviceEvent deviceEventInfo)
      Called to notify the client that a printer has event.
      void register(android.content.Context context)
      Register the observer to monitor state when device event changes.
      void unregister(android.content.Context context)
      Unregister the observer and stop monitoring state when device event changes.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver

        public AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver(android.os.Handler handler)

        Default AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver Constructor

        Parameters:
        handler - The handler to run callbacks on, or null if none.
        Since:
        API 5

    • Method Detail

      • register

        public void register(android.content.Context context)

        Register the observer to monitor state when device event changes.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, event will not be triggered.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 5

      • unregister

        public void unregister(android.content.Context context)

        Unregister the observer and stop monitoring state when device event changes.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 5

      • onChange

        public abstract void onChange(DeviceEvent deviceEventInfo)

        Called to notify the client that a printer has event.

        Parameters:
        deviceEventInfo - The detail of device event which occurs on a printer
        Since:
        API 5
